cases.prompt: Record this project result with its source and my exact contribution.
Interview me deeply about the Atlas project and surface tradeoffs and evidence gaps.
Merge the mature inbox notes into the existing work record without losing provenance.
Clarify my durable positioning between robotics data loops and agent platforms.
Turn my selected direction into a twelve-month plan with review signals.
Check whether my current objectives still support my long-term direction.
Find role directions where trace, replay, and evaluation are central responsibilities.
Preserve this job description and its source as a dated record.
Evaluate this job description against my evidence and identify unsupported gaps.
Compare these three platform roles without blending their requirements.
Audit the previous screening after I corrected the seniority and location.
Research this company and separate sourced facts from judgment.
Define exactly which team, role, location, and recruiter channel this conversation covers.
Record that a recruiter contacted me; do not mark it as an application.
Help me decide whether to continue this process and record the rationale locally.
Collect current primary-source signals about agent evaluation and governance roles.
Build a bounded two-year thesis from the dated signals and name disconfirming evidence.
Revisit last quarter's thesis using newer evidence and preserve what changed.
Identify the exact gaps between my baseline and this interview target.
Teach me retrieval evaluation using active recall tied to the gap we found.
Study this paper with me and connect the note to the relevant capability gap.
Run a strict mock interview on failure recovery and preserve my original answers.
Assess whether I meet the configured interview baseline without inferring from labs.
Retest only the blockers from the previous strict session.
Draft a recruiter introduction using only approved evidence-backed claims.
Tailor my resume to this target while keeping unsupported claims out.
Check this resume for claim support, visibility, and privacy risks.
I approve this artifact; create a shareable preview PDF.
Debrief this project, then use the grounded result to review my positioning.
Screen this role, research the company, tailor a draft, and prepare a strict interview session while leaving application state untouched.
Submit the application on my account.
Publish this profile and export the application PDF.
Delete the original evidence and overwrite the destination.
